results.name: has_cta
results.detail: button must be "Download Vibe Health →" + highlighted title

results.name: follows_json_schema
results.detail: key, theme not in health/looksmax, bg_prompts

rationales.hook_strength: 'Calm, steady energy' is soft and vague — no specific number, no contrarian angle, nothing that stops a scroller who's seen a dozen magnesium posts.
rationales.clarity: Each slide holds one idea and the food-first message lands cleanly, though 'hundreds of small jobs' is filler that could be cut.
rationales.audience_fit: Tired-by-3pm audience will recognize the sleep and energy angle, and the 'quiet rundown' framing matches their overwhelmed headspace.
rationales.novelty: Magnesium-for-sleep is among the most recycled health carousel topics; there's no fresh hook, stat, or contrarian reframe to make this version stand out.
rationales.brand_fit: Hedged claims throughout, plain conversational copy, no hype words, and the CTA ties directly to the Health Score product without cringe.
rationales.predicted_performance: Generic topic plus a soft cover equals low save velocity — this needs either a sharper angle or a surprising fact to earn the share.
